species.citation: (Blume) Benth. & Hook.f. , Gen. Pl. (Bentham & Hooker f.) 2 (1876) 681 ; Fern.-Vill., Novis. App. (1880) 128; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 366; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 309; Backer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 4 (1951) 225; ≡ Actegeton sarmentosa Blume , Bijdr. fl. Ned. Ind. (1826-1827) 1143.
species.distribution: Continental Asia, Java, Philippines. LUZON: Bataan, Batangas, Bulacan, Ilocos Norte, Laguna, NCR.
